seoTitle: Church Point vs Clandulla — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Church Point and Clandulla. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Church Point vs Clandulla: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Church Point and Clandulla.
heading: Church Point vs Clandulla — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Church Point, New South Wales and Clandulla, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Church Point has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Clandulla (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Church Point or Clandulla safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Church Point has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Clandulla scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Church Point scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Clandulla scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Church Point or Clandulla?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Church Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
